name: Karim Yazji
title: CEO/Managing Director
bio: Karim leads ASK Real Estate as CEO and Managing Director, overseeing a portfolio exceeding $3 billion in assets under management across Bahrain and Dubai. With over 15 years of executive experience in GCC real estate, he has built ASK into a full-service firm trusted by institutional investors and private clients alike, delivering end-to-end solutions across residential, commercial, and hospitality asset classes.

name: Ahmed Al Mansoori
title: Senior Property Consultant
bio: Ahmed is ASK Real Estate's go-to consultant for Juffair and Seef, with 8 years of experience placing expat executives and GCC investors in premium towers and serviced residences. His intimate knowledge of every delivered building in both districts — from floor plans to service charge schedules — means clients close faster and with confidence.

name: Sara Hassan
title: Property Consultant
bio: Sara specialises in Bahrain's most sought-after island communities at ASK Real Estate. With 5 years dedicated to Amwaj Islands and Bahrain Bay, she has an unmatched understanding of waterfront living — from marina-facing apartments to custom villas — and guides buyers through every step from viewings to handover.

name: Omar Khalid
title: Commercial Property Specialist
bio: Omar heads ASK Real Estate's commercial leasing desk, advising banks, embassies, and multinational firms on Grade A office space in the Diplomatic Area and Seef. With 6 years in commercial brokerage, he excels at structuring complex lease agreements and identifying emerging opportunities before they reach the open market.

name: Nadia Al Farsi
title: Senior Leasing Consultant
bio: Nadia has spent 9 years at ASK Real Estate mastering Bahrain's family-centric villa market in Riffa and Saar. As a Bahraini consultant who understands what growing families truly need — school proximity, community feel, and generous outdoor space — she consistently matches clients with homes they stay in for years.

name: Faisal Al Doseri
title: Property Consultant
bio: Faisal is ASK Real Estate's specialist for Bahrain's newest master-planned communities. With 4 years focused on Diyar Al Muharraq and Dilmunia Island, he helps first-time buyers and investors navigate off-plan purchases and ready-unit handovers in developments that are rapidly becoming the kingdom's most desirable addresses.

name: Layla Mahmoud
title: Luxury Property Specialist
bio: Layla manages ASK Real Estate's ultra-premium residential portfolio across Reef Island and Bahrain Bay. With 7 years advising high-net-worth individuals and family offices, she offers a discreet, white-glove service — from private viewings of penthouses and waterfront mansions to post-acquisition property management.

name: Reem Al Ansari
title: Property Consultant
bio: Reem covers ASK Real Estate's fast-growing northern coastal portfolio, specialising in Busaiteen and Marassi Al Bahrain. With 3 years in residential sales and leasing, she brings energy and local insight to a corridor seeing strong demand from young professionals and UAE-based investors seeking value without compromise.
